args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close">"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close"<"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Date" LIKE '2018%' AND "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close">"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close"<"Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Date" LIKE '2018%' AND "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index";

result.preview: "Indices in North America with more up days than down days in 2018: IXIC (NASDAQ Composite) \u2014 44 up days, 31 down days; GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite) \u2014 44 up days, 41 down days."

args.answer: Indices in North America with more up days than down days in 2018: IXIC (NASDAQ Composite) — 44 up days, 31 down days; GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite) — 44 up days, 41 down days.

val_args.answer: Indices in North America with more up days than down days in 2018: IXIC (NASDAQ Composite) — 44 up days, 31 down days; GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite) — 44 up days, 41 down days.
